name: @dkm/api-gateway
description: GraphQL API gateway (UI-3.2): a thin Yoga + Pothos server that projects the @dkm/query Query Interface and the @dkm/view-projection engine over GraphQL. SDL-as-contract (snapshot-tested); resolvers tested over the in-memory graph adapter, seeded from demo/*.jsonl via the shared seedInMemoryGraph(). Adapter-over-port (UI-D3) — no store reach-through.
